birth, date of death

- Monthly enrollment for each part of the Medicare program, A/B/C/D

Special considerations
- An enhanced version of this file (MBSF Base A/B/C/D V2) is available starting with the 2023 enrollment year. When requesting 2023 data, researchers will receive both the current MBSF Base A/B/C/D and the new V2
